title: Doccraft configuration
description: Configuration for doccraft skills and CLI behaviour. Managed by the doccraft-config skill — run `doccraft init` to scaffold, then invoke doccraft-config to tailor.

$schema.title: JSON Schema URL
$schema.description: Schema pointer consumed by IDE tooling for validation and hover tooltips. doccraft update keeps this in sync with the version stamp — do not edit manually.

version.title: Doccraft version
version.description: The doccraft version this config was last written or updated by. doccraft update bumps this automatically via surgical edit.

_hint.title: Authoring hint
_hint.description: Reminder that doccraft-config is the recommended authoring tool for this file. The schema embedded in the skill matches the installed doccraft version — no CLI call required for edits.
examples: Edit with the doccraft-config skill (npx doccraft@latest llm exposes the schema).

docsDir.title: Docs directory
docsDir.description: Root folder for all doccraft planning docs, relative to the project root. Substituted into installed skill files and Cursor rule globs as {{DOCS_DIR}} at install time. Re-run `doccraft update` after changing this value.

story.title: Story skill configuration
story.description: Vocabulary and identifier format consumed by the doccraft-story skill. Values here teach the skill your project-specific taxonomy without touching SKILL.md.

areas.title: Story areas
areas.description: Subsystem or team tags used in story `area:<value>` frontmatter. Aligns with your conventional-commit scopes for traceability.

slices.title: Product slices
slices.description: User-facing product surface tags used in story `slice:<value>` frontmatter. Leave empty for purely technical tools with no distinct product surfaces.

themes.title: Story themes
themes.description: Cross-cutting concern or delivery theme tags used in story `theme:<value>` frontmatter. Recur across multiple stories and help doccraft-session-wrap cluster related work.

id.title: Story identifier format
id.description: Controls which `id:` values doccraft-story accepts. Validated on creation and edit.

tiers.title: Priority tiers
tiers.description: Ordered priority tier prefixes (e.g. `p0`, `p1`). doccraft-story and doccraft-queue-audit use these to group and sort work. Empty list disables tier conventions.

pattern.title: ID pattern
pattern.description: Regex the story `id:` value must satisfy. Validated by doccraft-story on creation and edit. Use anchors (^ and $) to be precise.

queue.title: Queue configuration
queue.description: Labels for the named table sections in docs/queue.md. doccraft-queue-audit locates tables by heading text, not position.

tables.title: Queue table labels
tables.description: Human-readable heading text for each queue table section. Change these if your project uses different headings.

suggestedOrder.title: Suggested order table label
suggestedOrder.description: Heading for the main prioritised work queue. doccraft-queue-audit searches docs/queue.md for a table under this exact heading.

platformSpikes.title: Platform spikes table label
platformSpikes.description: Heading for exploratory or research work not yet ready for the main queue.

queueAudit.title: Queue audit configuration
queueAudit.description: Tuning knobs for the doccraft-queue-audit skill.

laneFrom.title: Lane source tags
laneFrom.description: Which frontmatter tag prefixes, in priority order, the audit uses to assign a story to a swimlane. First match wins. `area` is most common; set `slice` first for products that organise primarily by surface.

scale.title: Audit scale limits
scale.description: Safety thresholds that cause the audit to pause for confirmation before applying large changes. Raise for bigger projects; lower for strict containment.

maxStoryFiles.title: Max story files per audit run
maxStoryFiles.description: If a single audit pass would touch more than this many story files, it stops and asks for confirmation before applying.

maxQueueReorderPct.title: Max queue reorder percentage
maxQueueReorderPct.description: If a reorder would move more than this percentage of Suggested order rows, the audit stops for confirmation. Range 0–100.

features.title: Optional feature modules
features.description: Opt-in feature modules to enable. Each entry installs additional skills and activates conditional integration blocks in core skills. Currently supported: "business" (startup advisor + docs/business/ integration), "design" (designer-skills via npx during init/update). Absent or empty means no optional features.

sessionWrap.title: Session wrap configuration
sessionWrap.description: Controls which artifact categories doccraft-session-wrap considers in scope. Disabling a category prevents the skill from proposing that folder tree.

capture.title: Capture categories
capture.description: Enable or disable each artifact category. Set to `false` for categories your project does not maintain.

research.title: Research notes
research.description: Allow doccraft-session-wrap to propose artifacts under docs/research/. Set false if your project does not maintain a research folder.

reference.title: Reference docs
reference.description: Allow doccraft-session-wrap to propose artifacts under docs/reference/. Set false if your project does not maintain a reference folder.

business.title: Business updates
business.description: Allow doccraft-session-wrap to propose artifacts under docs/business/. Set false if your project does not maintain a business folder.
